title: calcearia koresii
intro: Calcearia koresii, also known as the Himalayan snake grass, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Calcearia koresii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and tuberculosis. Calcearia koresii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in some parts of Asia.
